data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. SUPER MIND was out of the money two runs back at this track then displayed pleasing improvement last start to score by 5 metres over 1609m at the same circuit. Sure to enjoy an economical run from this draw. Taking on a better field but he is capable of running another big race. 2. POOR POP WYATT drew wide last start and was never a genuine threat, beaten 18 metres into eighth at this track over 1609m. No excuses from this more advantageous draw. Meets a similar quality field and is good enough to take out a race like this. 6. GRAND SPA is on the radar after his last-start fourth over 1609m at this track a week ago. 8. WHATS SHAKIN could only finish ninth over 1609m at this track most recently. Open to improvement and is in the mix.","runners":[3,2,6,8],"exclusive":false}
